sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37169" key="e)ce/reisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξέρ-εισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n37169.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prop, support,</tr_> metaph., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40.4</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
